meta.notes: Member counts are approximate as of early 2026. ETF relevance scored 1-10. Facebook investing communities tend to be group-centric rather than individual-influencer driven.

groups.name: Bogleheads Community
groups.focus: Index investing, 3-fund portfolio (VTI/VXUS/BND), low-cost ETFs, passive investing philosophy
groups.content_type: Portfolio reviews, ETF comparisons, tax-efficient investing discussions
groups.engagement_note: The gold standard for index/ETF investing community; 2,000+ posts/day on forum; strong crossover to Facebook group. Ideal for ETF education partnerships.

groups.name: Stock Market for Beginners (Admins)
groups.focus: Investing basics, stock picking, ETF introductions for newcomers
groups.content_type: Beginner Q&A, educational posts, basic portfolio construction
groups.engagement_note: Good entry point for reaching new investors who are ETF-curious; active community with beginner-friendly tone

groups.name: Market Traders & Penny Stocks (Admins)
groups.focus: Active trading, penny stocks, some ETF discussion (leveraged/sector ETFs)
groups.engagement_note: One of the fastest-growing Facebook trading groups (since 2018); high volume but more trading-oriented than buy-and-hold ETF focused

groups.name: Robinhood Stock Trading (Community)
groups.focus: Robinhood platform discussion, stocks, ETFs, options
groups.content_type: Portfolio screenshots, trade ideas, platform tips, 450+ posts/day
groups.engagement_note: Highly active community; younger demographic aligned with commission-free ETF trading; good for reaching retail ETF buyers

groups.name: FIRE (Financial Independence Retire Early)
groups.focus: Financial independence, index fund investing, ETF portfolio optimization, withdrawal strategies
groups.content_type: Portfolio allocation debates, Vanguard/Fidelity ETF comparisons, safe withdrawal rate discussions
groups.engagement_note: FIRE community is heavily ETF-aligned; members actively discuss Vanguard ETF performance and 3-fund strategies; high-intent audience

groups.name: Sensible Investing (UK-focused)
groups.focus: Evidence-based investing, Vanguard LifeStrategy, global ETFs
groups.content_type: ETF performance reviews, portfolio construction, cost analysis
groups.engagement_note: UK-centric passive investing group; strong alignment with Vanguard and iShares ETF products; educated investor audience

groups.name: Value Investing Group
groups.focus: Value stocks, Buffett-style investing, value ETFs (VTV, SCHV)
groups.content_type: Stock analysis, annual letter discussions, value ETF comparisons
groups.engagement_note: Long-running Facebook group for fundamental analysis; growing discussion of value-factor ETFs and smart-beta strategies

groups.name: Dividend Growth Investing Community
groups.focus: Dividend stocks, dividend ETFs (SCHD, VYM, DGRO), passive income
groups.content_type: Dividend income tracking, ETF yield comparisons, DRIP strategies
groups.engagement_note: Highly relevant for dividend ETF marketing; members actively compare SCHD vs VYM vs HDV; monthly income screenshot sharing drives engagement

groups.name: 한국 주식/ETF 투자 커뮤니티
groups.focus: 한국/미국 주식, ETF 투자, 연금저축 ETF
groups.content_type: 종목 분석, ETF 추천, 투자 후기
groups.engagement_note: 한국어권 페이스북 투자 커뮤니티; 미국 ETF(SPY, QQQ, SCHD) 관련 논의 활발; 네이버 카페와 병행 활동하는 회원 다수
